description: GTM System Optimization Tier 1 — Knowledge architecture: CLAUDE.md, index.md, log.md, frontmatter on company files, tasks cleanup

userStories.title: Create gtm/CLAUDE.md auto-loading context file
userStories.description: As a GTM agent entering the gtm/ directory, I need an auto-loading CLAUDE.md so I get the GTM brain injected without re-orientation every session.
acceptanceCriteria: File exists at gtm/CLAUDE.md
Under 100 lines total

Contains inline one-liner versions of all 10 rules from gtm/RULES.md (no hallucinated hooks, no auto-drafting, Attio source of truth, dedup before prospecting, no remote push, supply-side moonvalley only, immutable sequences, copy scoring >=9.5, check both inboxes+sent, founder posture)
Contains @./index.md import line
Contains @./pipeline/PIPELINE.md import line
Contains @./strategy/messaging.md import line
Contains @./log.md import line
All @import paths resolve to files that actually exist (verify with ls for each)
No content beyond: summary, rules, and @imports — everything else lives in indexed files
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Rules numbered 1-10 after PI confidentiality removal. See gtm/GTM-HARDENED-IMPLEMENTATION-SPEC.md Task 1.1 for exact content template.

userStories.title: Create gtm/index.md navigation map
userStories.description: As a GTM agent, I need a single index file that tells me what every file in gtm/ covers so I can fetch only what I need.
acceptanceCriteria: File exists at gtm/index.md
Under 60 lines total
One line per .md file in gtm/ directories, grouped by: Strategy, Playbooks, Pipeline, Campaigns, Contacts, Knowledge Graph, Supply Side, Agent Architecture, Tools, Sessions
Each entry format: - [filename](relative-path) — description under 150 chars
Every .md file in gtm/ subdirectories (excluding CLAUDE.md, index.md, log.md, GTM-OPTIMIZATION-PLAN.md, GTM-HARDENED-IMPLEMENTATION-SPEC.md) has an entry
No broken links — verify each path resolves to an existing file
Grouped by update frequency: stable then living then active then reference
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use find gtm/ -name '*.md' -not -path '*/knowledge-graph/companies/*' to enumerate top-level files. Knowledge graph gets one entry pointing to its INDEX.md.

userStories.title: Create gtm/log.md append-only changelog
userStories.description: As a GTM agent, I need a changelog of recent state changes so I can catch up on what happened without reading every file.
acceptanceCriteria: File exists at gtm/log.md
Title line: '# GTM Changelog' with comment: '<!-- Newest first. One line per state change. -->'
Seeded with historical entries from pipeline/PIPELINE.md and pipeline/snapshots/W16-2026-04-13.md

At least 10 historical entries covering key events: HackerRank to Customer, Troveo to Negotiating, Ropedia NDA, Mirelo call, Rhoda pricing, Supply Wave 1 loaded, Wave 5 loaded, Wave 4 loaded, HackerRank MSA signed
Newest entry at top, oldest at bottom
Every entry has absolute date prefix (YYYY-MM-DD format)
No relative dates (no 'yesterday' or 'last week')
Under 50 lines for initial seed
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: See gtm/GTM-HARDENED-IMPLEMENTATION-SPEC.md Task 1.3 for seed content.

userStories.title: Add YAML frontmatter to knowledge-graph company files — batch 1 (active deals)
userStories.description: As a GTM agent, I need frontmatter on active deal company files so I can grep by state, side, stage, and ICP score.
acceptanceCriteria: All company files listed in knowledge-graph/INDEX.md under 'Active Deals' have YAML frontmatter added
Frontmatter uses schema: type: company, state: active, side: demand|supply|both, icp_score: 0-100, stage: per pipeline, last_contact: YYYY-MM-DD or blank, last_updated: 2026-04-13
Active deal companies include at minimum: perceptron-ai, rhoda-ai, getreal-labs, mirelo, decart, hackerrank, troveo, zencastr, introspector, media-shippers, hub-xyz
side values correctly set per channel: troveo=supply, zencastr=supply, introspector=supply, media-shippers=supply, hub-xyz=supply/both, others=demand
stage values match pipeline/PIPELINE.md current stages
Existing file content below the frontmatter closing --- is completely unchanged
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Only active deals in this story (~11 files). Read each file, read pipeline/PIPELINE.md for current stage, add frontmatter at top.

userStories.title: Add YAML frontmatter to knowledge-graph company files — batch 2 (supply-side targets)
userStories.description: As a GTM agent, I need frontmatter on supply-side target files so grep 'side: supply' returns the correct set.
acceptanceCriteria: All company files listed in knowledge-graph/INDEX.md under 'Supply-Side Subcontractor Targets' have YAML frontmatter
Supply-side targets include at minimum: mecka-ai, cortex-ai, luel, build-ai, sama, lxt, centific, smartone-ai, objectways, cogito-tech, sigma-ai, alegion, imerit, cloudfactory, ropedia, deepen-ai
All have side: supply in frontmatter
state: prospect for most, state: active for any currently in Smartlead campaigns
icp_score values taken from knowledge-graph/INDEX.md where listed, 0 if not scored
Existing file content below frontmatter closing --- is completely unchanged
grep 'side: supply' gtm/knowledge-graph/companies/*.md returns all supply-side targets
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: ~16 files. Check knowledge-graph/INDEX.md 'Supply-Side Subcontractor Targets' table for the full list and ICP scores.

userStories.title: Add YAML frontmatter to knowledge-graph company files — batch 3 (remaining demand-side)
userStories.description: As a GTM agent, I need frontmatter on all remaining company files for complete grep coverage across the knowledge graph.
acceptanceCriteria: All remaining company files in gtm/knowledge-graph/companies/ that do not already have frontmatter get it added
Default values: type: company, state: prospect, side: demand, icp_score: 0, stage: researched, last_updated: 2026-04-13
If file content mentions supply-side or annotation company context, set side: supply instead
Existing file content below frontmatter closing --- is completely unchanged
Verify complete coverage: grep -rL '^---' gtm/knowledge-graph/companies/ returns no results (every file has frontmatter)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the largest batch (~140+ files). Process alphabetically. Use defaults unless file content clearly indicates otherwise. Speed over precision — scores can be refined later.

userStories.title: Create tasks/index.md and archive completed wave files
userStories.description: As a GTM agent, I need the tasks/ folder indexed so I can find active tasks without listing 30+ files.
acceptanceCriteria: Directory tasks/archive/ exists
Completed wave draft files moved to tasks/archive/: campaign-drafts-v2.md, campaign-drafts-scored.md, supply-side-drafts.md
tasks/index.md exists with one-line entries for every remaining active task file in tasks/
Each entry format: - [filename](filename) — description and current status
No broken references from gtm/ or other files pointing to moved files (grep for moved filenames across the project)
If any broken refs found in gtm/ files, update the reference to point to tasks/archive/ path
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check gtm/playbooks/copy.md which references tasks/campaign-drafts-scored.md and similar. Update those refs after moving.

userStories.title: Validation pass — verify all Tier 1 files are consistent
userStories.description: As the GTM system owner, I need a final validation confirming all new files are internally consistent with no broken links.
acceptanceCriteria: gtm/CLAUDE.md exists and is under 100 lines with all @imports resolving to real files
gtm/index.md exists and is under 60 lines with no broken links (verify each path with ls)
gtm/log.md exists with newest-first entries and all dates in YYYY-MM-DD format
Every file in gtm/knowledge-graph/companies/ has YAML frontmatter (grep -rL '^---' returns empty)
grep 'side: supply' returns only supply-side companies (spot-check 5 results)
grep 'state: active' returns companies that match pipeline/PIPELINE.md active deals (spot-check 5 results)
tasks/index.md exists with all entries pointing to real files
tasks/archive/ contains the moved completed wave files
No orphaned references to moved files found anywhere in gtm/ directory
gtm/README.md content is not contradicted by new files (no conflicting navigation instructions)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the QA story. Run all grep and ls verification commands listed above. Fix any issues found before marking complete.
